name: Hook Development
description: Guidance for creating Claude Code plugin hooks — PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Notification events. Covers ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, prompt-based hooks API, validation patterns, and blocking dangerous commands.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Desenvolvimento de Hooks
pt-BR.description: Guia para criar hooks de plugin do Claude Code — eventos PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Notification. Cobre ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, API de hooks baseada em prompt, padrões de validação e bloqueio de comandos perigosos.
